The '''Leefari Sea''' was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]], adjacent to the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Calius saj Leeloo]] (City of Glowing Crystal). Saltile spray from its dark red-orange [[Water/Legends|waters]] built up over eons to create the gigantic [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] that artisans sculpted into that City of Glowing Crystal.
